displayMetadata.name: KEY INFORMATION
displayMetadata.value:
• Contains real seafood and tom yam paste
• Ready in 3 minutes

displayMetadata.name: PREPARATION
displayMetadata.value:
• Directions:
1. Pull lid back to indicated line, add laksa paste and pour boiling water up to inner line
2. Close lid for 3 minutes
3. Remove lid, stir well and serve
• Note:
Do not microwave

metaData.Key Information: By blending the piquancy of lime and chili, the tom yam broth entices with its delicate balance of tanginess and spiciness. Spicy and sour taste with prawn seasoning caters to Singaporeans' taste preferences.

metaData.SAP Product Name: MYOJO QUICK CUP NOODLES - TOM YAM 69G

product.name: Myojo Quick Cup Noodles - Tom Yam

metaData.Key Information: Myojo packet noodles feature authentic local flavours satisfying cravings for generations. Myojo first launch in the Singapore market more than 40 years ago and continues to be the best seller today. Some of the uniquely available unique flavours include Thai Tom Yam, Chicken Abalone, Korean Kimchi, Curry Chicken, Shrimp Tanmen, Chilli Crab, Prawn Noodles, Char Mee and Mee Poh. One can now enjoy hawker fares at the comforts of their own home. What’s more, this range is Halal certified to cater to all. So now everyone can enjoy Myojo! What are you waiting for? Try them all today!
metaData.Preparation:
Directions:
1. Put noodles into 450ml of boiling water in a pot and boil
2. Cook for 4 minutes
3. Remove pot from heat and put seasoning powder to the noodles
4. Mix well and serve immediately

product.name: Maggi Big 2-Minute Instant Noodle - Tom Yam

metaData.Key Information:
• Perfect Korean famous taste
• Great small cup sized noodle that is good for snacking
metaData.Preparation:
Cooking directions:
• For hot water:
1. Open lid halfway and add soup base
2. Pour hot water up to the line inside
3. Close lid for 3 minutes
4. Stir well and serve
• For microwave:
1. Completely remove lid
2. Pour room temperature water up to the line inside
3. Microwave for 3 minutes
4. Stir well and ready to serve
metaData.SAP Product Name: NONGSHIM CUP NOODLES - SPICY MUSHROOM FLAVOR 72G

metaData.Ingredients:
• Noodle: Wheat Flour, Palm Olein (contains Permitted Antioxidant: BHA), Salt, Guar Gum, Sodium Polyphosphate, Potassium Carbonate and Sodium Carbonate
• Seasoning Powder: Salt, Chilli Powder, Monosodium Glutamate, Spices, Yeast Extract and contains Permitted Flavour Enhancer (E631)
• Soy Sauce: Soybean, Sugar, Salt, Flour, Brown Sugar, Caramel, Monosodium Glutamate and Benzoic Acid
• Seasoning Oil: Palm Olein (contains Permitted Antioxidant: BHA) and Shallot
• Chilli Sauce: Chilli, Water, Sugar, Salt, Garlic and Acetic Acid
metaData.Preparation:
Cooking Instruction:

1. Boil noodles in briskly boiling water for 3 minutes

2. Mix seasoning and sauces while noodles are being cooked

3. Take noodles out from water and take well

4. Mix noodles thoroughly with the seasoning and it is ready to be served
